response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. Intro is a pixel art sequence with no vocals. Main performance starts at 01:10. Screen shows "XY&Z" and "作詞・作曲: 佐香智久". Performed by Hakuikoyori. Performed web search for '"XY&Z" Tomohisa Sako Japanese and English lyrics'. Successfully retrieved Japanese lyrics and English translation. Performance ends at 04:26.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a pixel-art style intro followed by a 3D musical performance by the VTuber Hakuikoyori, who sings the song "XY&Z" (originally by Tomohisa Sako).

scenes.description: Pixel art style intro sequence with gameplay UI elements. No singing.
Hakuikoyori performs "XY&Z" on a 3D stage with screen text indicating title and composer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ヘイ！カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
(ニトロチャージ、熱く行こうぜ)
さあ！進もうぜ、いつでも準備はOK
(型破り、変幻自在で)
重なり合う思いが、奇跡を呼び起こす
XY&Z！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey! Like that morning sun shining on Kalos
(Nitro charge, let's go hot)
Come on! Let's move forward, we're always ready
(Unconventional, changing freely)
Our overlapping feelings will summon a miracle
XY&Z!

scenes.description: Performance ends, Hakuikoyori talks to the audience. No singing.
